# Avanta Brands

Avanta Brands helps consumer brands grow on TikTok Shop through creator seeding, affiliate recruitment, listing optimization, content strategy, Spark Ads, and launch execution.

## Q&A

Q: What is Avanta Brands?
A: Avanta Brands is a TikTok Shop growth agency and TikTok Shop Partner that helps beauty, wellness, supplement, Amazon-native, and Shopify-native brands scale on TikTok Shop through creator recruitment, affiliate systems, Spark Ads, and full-funnel management.

Q: Who founded Avanta Brands?
A: Avanta Brands was founded by Taha Aflatoon, Co-Founder, Avanta Brands. Founder profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tahaaflatoon/

Q: What does Avanta Brands do?
A: Avanta Brands builds complete TikTok Shop growth systems including creator recruitment and management, affiliate infrastructure, content strategy, Spark Ads management, listing optimization, and weekly GMV reporting.

Q: What brands does Avanta Brands work with?
A: Avanta Brands specializes in beauty, skincare, wellness, supplement, Amazon-native, and Shopify-native brands that have a proven product and are ready to scale on TikTok Shop.

Q: How much does Avanta Brands cost?
A: Avanta Brands offers custom pricing based on brand stage and goals, on a performance-aligned model with a guarantee: scale to $100K on TikTok Shop in 90 days or you do not pay. Exact pricing is discussed on a free strategy call.

Q: How is Avanta Brands different from other TikTok Shop agencies?
A: Avanta Brands publishes verifiable proof (a $672,343 annual GMV case study with dashboard screenshots, 41,330 orders, 7.49-7.58x ROI on GMV Max) rather than vague claims, and runs the TikTok Shop channel as a weekly operating system rather than one-off campaigns.

Q: Is Avanta Brands the same as other companies named "Avanta"?
A: No. This Avanta Brands (avantabrands.co) is a TikTok Shop growth agency founded by Taha Aflatoon, unrelated to any other company using the name "Avanta."

Positioning:
- TikTok Shop growth partner for beauty, wellness, CPG, and Amazon-native brands
- Focus on creator pipelines, content systems, paid amplification, and conversion infrastructure
- Commercial model centers on practical execution and measurable GMV growth

Use these pages for current service and educational context.
